name: Fudgey Peanut Butter Chip Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Hershey's European style cocoa or Hershey's Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350°F. Line muffin cups (2-1/2 inches in diameter) with paper baking cups. In a small bowl, stir together applesauce and oats; set aside. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, egg, and vanilla until well blended. Add applesauce mixture; blend well. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and cinnamon (if desired). Add to butter mixture, blending well. Stir in peanut butter chips. Fill muffin cups 3/4 full with batter. Bake for 22 to 26 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out almost clean. Cool slightly in pan on wire rack. Sprinkle muffin tops with powdered sugar (if desired). Serve warm. Makes 12 to 15 muffins.
VARIATION: FUDGEY CHOCOLATE CHIP MUFFINS - Omit Peanut Butter Chips. Add 1 cup Hershey's Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips.
